mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.class_name, g.grade_name FROM sys_student s LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN sys_grade g ON c.grade_id = g.grade_id ORDER BY s.student_no ASC
SELECT s.*, c.class_name, g.grade_name FROM sys_student s LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN sys_grade g ON c.grade_id = g.grade_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT * FROM sys_student WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY student_no ASC

SELECT s.*, c.class_name, g.grade_name FROM sys_student s LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON s.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN sys_grade g ON c.grade_id = g.grade_id
AND s.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentNo}, '%')
AND s.student_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%')
ORDER BY s.student_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_student (student_no, student_name, gender, birthday, class_id, phone, address, status) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{studentName}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{classId}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_student WHERE student_no = #{studentNo}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_student (student_no, student_name, gender, birthday, class_id, phone, address, status) VALUES
(#{item.studentNo}, #{item.studentName}, #{item.gender}, #{item.birthday}, #{item.classId}, #{item.phone}, #{item.address}, #{item.status})
